body:
Sarah, I wanted to reach out before the holidays to say how much I've valued your perspective this year—your input on the [Halfway Capital](halfway-capital) diligence process for our climate infrastructure deals has been genuinely invaluable. The framing you gave us around grid-edge compute and its intersection with demand-response markets helped sharpen how we evaluate a whole category of founders we'd previously been underwriting too conservatively. I'm hoping we can carve out some time in early January to do a proper retrospective and talk through where you'd like to focus your advisory bandwidth in Q1. I have two or three companies in the pipeline right now that I think would benefit enormously from a conversation with you—one in particular working on AI-optimized substation controls that I think will surprise you. Would the week of January 12th work for a call, or are you still traveling then? Either way, wishing you a restful end to what has been a genuinely wild year.

— Amara
